extensions.title: Currency Converter
extensions.shortDescription: Convert real and crypto currencies.
extensions.description: Need to convert currencies on the fly without breaking your workflow? Currency Converter for Command Palette is a fast, lightweight extension for the Windows Command Palette that lets you seamlessly translate between global fiat money and cryptocurrencies. Instead of opening a browser tab, simply pull up your command palette, type in your amount, and get instant, accurate results. Whether you are using natural language, currency symbols, or even doing quick inline math before a conversion, this tool handles it effortlessly.

extensions.title: PortPilot
extensions.shortDescription: Find and free dev server ports directly from PowerToys Command Palette.
extensions.description: PortPilot helps developers quickly find and free busy dev server ports from inside PowerToys Command Palette. It scans TCP listening ports in the common 3000-10000 development range, shows the owning process name and PID, supports fuzzy search, and asks for confirmation before terminating a process. You can also pin PortPilot to the Command Palette dock for one-click access.

extensions.title: Weather
extensions.shortDescription: Current conditions, hourly forecasts, and multi-day forecasts right from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Bring your weather conditions and forecasts to your fingertips with the Weather extension for Command Palette.

Search locations or save your favorite to see current, hourly, or the 7-day weather forecast. View temperature, feels like, humidity, wind speed, and conditions for any location worldwide.

Weather for Command Palette also integrates with Command Palette's dock feature, showing your current conditions and providing a quick overview window with a 3-hour and 3-day forecast.

Configurable units for temperature (Fahrenheit/Celsius), wind speed (mph/km/h), and adjustable update intervals. Weather data provided by Open-Meteo — free and no API key required.

extensions.title: Project Opener
extensions.shortDescription: A project opener.
extensions.description: An extension that can search for and open local Visual Studio Code (VS Code) installations and derivative editors (Trae, Cursor, etc.).

extensions.title: ADB Extension
extensions.shortDescription: Control connected Android devices directly from Command Palette
extensions.description:
ADB Extension brings Android Debug Bridge commands to your Command Palette. Browse installed apps, install APKs, uninstall, launch, force-stop, clear data, grant/revoke permissions, launch deep links, take screenshots, toggle developer options, airplane mode, Wi-Fi, mobile data, and mark favourite apps for quick access.

Built this because I kept alt-tabbing to a terminal for the same five ADB commands. Hope others find it useful too.

Requires ADB installed and available in your PATH.

extensions.title: Edge Favorites
extensions.shortDescription: Open Microsoft Edge favorites in Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Quickly open Microsoft Edge favorites, folders, and workspaces from the Command Palette while staying in your current workflow, using a smooth keyboard-first experience.

Supports all release channels.

extensions.title: Visual Studio
extensions.shortDescription: Open Visual Studio recents from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Quickly open Visual Studio recents from the Command Palette while staying in your current workflow, using a smooth keyboard-first experience.

Supports Visual Studio 2019, 2022, and 2026 across all editions and release channels.

extensions.title: QR Code
extensions.shortDescription: Generate QR codes quickly and easily with support for dynamic placeholders like IP addresses, date, and time.
extensions.description:
QR Code is a PowerToys Command Palette extension for generating QR codes quickly and easily.

You can use placeholders in your input and they will be expanded in the generated QR code and details view:
- {ip_local}: local LAN IPv4 address
- {ip_public}: public IPv4 address (best-effort)
- {ip}: alias for {ip_local}
- {date}: current date (locale format)
- {time}: current time (locale format)

The extension keeps a history of your generated QR codes for quick access and reuse. Install via winget or the Microsoft Store, then open Command Palette to start generating QR codes.

extensions.title: Web Search Shortcut
extensions.shortDescription: Quickly select a specific search engine to perform searches via keyword prefixes.
extensions.description:
Web Search Shortcut is a PowerToys Command Palette extension for quickly selecting a specific search engine to perform searches via keyword prefixes.

You can configure multiple search engines, each with a custom keyword, URL template, icon, and search suggestion provider. Supports Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, YouTube, Wikipedia, npm, CanIUse, and more.

Install via winget or the Microsoft Store, then open Command Palette to start searching with your configured shortcuts.

extensions.title: Scripter
extensions.shortDescription: Scripter integrates with the Windows Command Palette to let you conveniently run scripts from Command Palette.
extensions.description: Scripter integrates with the Windows Command Palette to let you conveniently run scripts from Command Palette. This is an open source project, you can find the documents and source code at https://github.com/determ1ne/CmdPalScripter .

extensions.title: YubiKey OATH OTP
extensions.shortDescription: Display TOTP codes from OATH accounts stored on your YubiKey in PowerToys Command Palette.
extensions.description:
YubiKey OATH OTP integrates YubiKey hardware-based TOTP codes directly into the PowerToys Command Palette.

Features:
- Lists all OATH/TOTP accounts stored on your connected YubiKey
- Generates current one-time passwords via the ykman CLI
- Click any account to instantly copy the code to clipboard
- Smart 10-second caching for minimal latency
- Configurable ykman path and device ID for multi-key setups

Requirements:
- YubiKey hardware with OATH credentials configured
- YubiKey Manager CLI (ykman) installed and in PATH (or path configured in settings)

extensions.title: Bitwarden
extensions.shortDescription: Instant search and copy of credentials, TOTP codes, and notes from your Bitwarden vault, directly from the Command Palette.
extensions.description:
A free, open-source extension that brings your Bitwarden vault into the Command Palette for instant, keyboard-driven access. Built as an alternative to 1Password Quick Access.

Features:

- Vault search with fallback suggestions across all item types
- Secure clipboard: passwords excluded from clipboard history and auto-cleared on a configurable timer
- Smart sorting: recently used, favorites, and context-matched items float to the top
- TOTP display with live codes and countdown timers (including Steam Guard)
- Search filters using prefix syntax like is:fav, folder:Work, has:totp, url:github
- Watchtower tags: visual warnings for weak, old, or reused passwords
- Context awareness: detects open apps and browser tabs to surface relevant items
- Custom field copy, SSH quick-connect, and manual vault sync

Requires the Bitwarden CLI (bw) on your PATH.

extensions.title: Temp file cleaner
extensions.shortDescription: Clean Temp files on one click
extensions.description: Use cmdpal to clean %temp% folder in one click

extensions.title: SourceSwitch
extensions.shortDescription: Switch Monitor Inputs (HDMI/DP, etc.) via Command Palette.
extensions.description: Switch Monitor Inputs (HDMI/DP, etc.) via Command Palette.

extensions.title: Toggle HDR
extensions.shortDescription: Toggle HDR on/off for a single display at a time.
extensions.description:
Enables you to toggle Windows HDR for one of the displays attached to your machine at a time. Primarily avoiding the global Windows shortcut Win + Alt + B, which toggles HDR for all monitors at once.

It was written to solve the problem of wanting to enable HDR for a game on a main display, while not having blown-out HDR elements displaying on other displays running other applications.

extensions.title: Change Case
extensions.shortDescription: Transform text case with camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, UPPER, lower, title, and more.
extensions.description:
Effortlessly transform text case without leaving the Command Palette. Instantly change the case of text from your clipboard or text entered directly into the Command Palette—no need to switch apps or use additional tools.

Choose from a wide array of case transformations, including Capital Case, Title Case (Chicago style), UPPER CASE, lower case, Sentence case, rAndOm cAsE, sWAP cASE, and more. Developers will appreciate technical options like camelCase, CONSTANT_CASE, Header-Case, kebab-case, PascalCase, and snake_case.

The extension also remembers your last used transformations, making it quick and easy to access your most common actions without searching through menus.

Take control over text formatting with separator transformations such as dot.case, path/case, and path\case\with\backslash. Easily clean up your text by removing diacritics, special symbols, and duplicate spaces, tabs, or lines.

extensions.title: Colors
extensions.shortDescription: Visualize, convert, and manipulate colors instantly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Instant color visualization, conversion, and manipulation directly within the Command Palette. Effortlessly preview, transform, and work with colors—no need to leave your workflow.

Convert between color formats including HEX, RGB, HSL, and more. Preview colors in real time as you type, pick colors from the screen, and copy values in your preferred format.

Perfect for designers and developers who need quick access to color tools without switching applications.

extensions.title: Dev Numbers
extensions.shortDescription: Convert and calculate numeric values across decimal, hex, octal, and binary formats.
extensions.description:
A powerful tool for converting and calculating numeric values across various number systems. Whether you’re a developer, engineer, or tech enthusiast, this extension simplifies numeric manipulation with seamless input recognition and smart format handling.

Dev Numbers supports conversions between decimal, hexadecimal, octal, and binary formats, and automatically detects numerous format styles, including those used in C, C++, C#, Visual Basic, and more. It even accommodates format suffixes and special characters for maximum flexibility.

You can also specify bit lengths for accurate truncation or representation of negative numbers, making it ideal for low-level development tasks. With Dev Numbers, working with complex numeric formats is easier, faster, and more intuitive.

extensions.title: Errors and Codes
extensions.shortDescription: Look up NTSTATUS, HRESULT, and Windows error codes with detailed explanations.
extensions.description:
Instantly make sense of cryptic error codes! Quickly access clear, detailed explanations of NTSTATUS, HRESULT, and other common Microsoft and Windows error codes—right from the Command Palette.

Whether you’re debugging, troubleshooting, or just curious, simply type or paste an error code in any format (hex, decimal, signed, or unsigned) and let the tool do the rest. The extension automatically detects the format and finds all relevant representations across a variety of Microsoft products.

Drawing on authoritative sources like Winerror.h and Setupapi.h from Windows SDK 10.0.26100, this extension ensures you have the context you need, when you need it. While the database is extensive, it may not cover every possible error code.

Spend less time searching, and more time solving problems—with error details just a keystroke away.

extensions.title: Media Controls
extensions.shortDescription: Control media playback and switch between apps playing audio or video directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Take full control of your media playback without ever leaving your workflow. Manage audio and video seamlessly across your favorite apps—all from one convenient place. Instantly play, pause, skip tracks, or jump back, and easily switch between open media players.

Supports popular applications including Apple Music, Spotify, foobar2000, VLC UWP, Media Player, Microsoft Edge, Google Chrome and other web browsers, Netflix, Disney+, HBO Max, SkyShowtime, Amazon Prime Video and other video players, YouTube, SoundCloud and other web players, and many more.

With intuitive commands for shuffle, loop, and quick player switching, it’s the perfect companion for anyone who juggles multiple media sources while working.

extensions.title: QR Codes
extensions.shortDescription: Generate, scan, and decode QR codes for URLs, text, email, phone numbers, and contacts.
extensions.description:
Instantly create, scan, and manage QR codes right from the Command Palette—no need to open another app or website. Generate QR codes for URLs, text, and more with just a few keystrokes. Whether you’re sharing information with colleagues or quickly transferring data to your mobile device, it’s the fastest way to get it done.

Generate QR codes for a wide range of data types—including URLs, email addresses, phone numbers, and contact cards—and scan or decode QR codes directly from your screen or images in your clipboard. All generated QR codes are crisp, high-quality, and ready to use anywhere.

It’s fast, efficient, and works entirely offline for your privacy. Perfect for developers, IT pros, educators, or anyone who frequently needs to generate QR codes without breaking their workflow.

extensions.title: Recent Files
extensions.shortDescription: Quickly access your most recently opened files directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Provides quick access to recently opened files directly from the Command Palette. Browse your file history and reopen documents, projects, and other files without navigating through folders or searching your system.

The extension integrates with the Windows recent files list, giving you instant access to your most frequently used files right where you need them.

extensions.title: Symbols and Emojis
extensions.shortDescription: Search and insert Unicode symbols, emojis, and special characters with code points and details.
extensions.description:
Need to quickly find and use a symbol, emoji, or special character? This extension brings a full Unicode character explorer right into your Command Palette. Instantly search for any emoji, symbol, or Unicode character by name or category, view detailed character info, and copy it to your clipboard with a click.

Whether you're a developer, designer, or power user, this tool saves time by providing code points, escape sequences, HTML entities, and LaTeX representations all in one place. No need to open a separate app or website—everything is accessible right from your workspace.

Perfect for coding, writing documentation, creating content, or simply spicing up your messages with emojis.

extensions.title: Toggle Dark Mode
extensions.shortDescription: Quickly toggle Windows or application dark mode directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Toggle dark mode quickly from Command Palette. Switch between light and dark color modes for Windows or individual applications with a single command.

Set color mode for the system and applications together or separately, and configure the default behavior to suit your needs. Perfect for quickly adapting your display to different lighting conditions or personal preferences.

extensions.title: Unit Converter
extensions.shortDescription: Convert between common units of measurement like length, weight, time, volume, and area.
extensions.description:
Stop switching between apps or browsing the web for simple conversions. With Unit Converter for Command Palette, you can instantly convert between common units of measurement—right within your workflow.

Easily convert between length, weight, time, volume, area, temperature, speed, and more without interrupting your flow. Simply open the Command Palette, type your query (like "10 km in miles"), and get results in real-time.

Whether you're a developer, student, or multitasker, this extension helps you stay focused by delivering fast and accurate unit conversions. Perfect for anyone needing quick conversions without clutter or distraction.

extensions.title: NBA
extensions.shortDescription: Real-time NBA scores, schedules, rosters, and stats right in your Command Palette.
extensions.description: Bring the NBA into your Windows Command Palette. Browse upcoming games for the week with live scores, team records, and game status indicators. View statistical leaders for any matchup — season PPG, RPG, and APG for upcoming games, or per-game leaders for live and completed matchups. Explore full team rosters with player bios, jersey numbers, physical stats, injury status, and direct links to ESPN pages for player stats, game logs, news, and splits. Smart fuzzy search lets you filter by team name instantly — type "lakers" or "warriors" and find what you need without leaving your workflow. Game data and stats courtesy of ESPN.

extensions.title: Bitwarden
extensions.shortDescription: Integrates your Bitwarden vault into Windows PowerToys. Search, access, and manage credentials directly from the Command Palette.
extensions.description: Bitwarden For Command Palette integrates with the Windows Command Palette to bring your password vault directly into your workflow. It allows you to search logins, cards, and identities, copy TOTP codes with live countdowns, and manage vault items (CRUD) with lightning speed. Supports Windows Hello (via bw-bio) and custom CLI configurations.

extensions.title: Aria2 Extension
extensions.shortDescription: Use Aria2 for efficient downloads.
extensions.description: Aria2 Extension for Command Palette is an extension for the PowerToys Command Palette that enables using Aria2, a lightweight multi-protocol and multi-source command-line download utility.

extensions.title: NuGet Package Search
extensions.shortDescription: Search for NuGet packages via a UI.
extensions.description: NuGetPackageSearchExtension is an extension for the PowerToys Command Palette that enables searching for NuGet packages via a UI and provides the ability to copy the package reference, dotnet command, and NuGet package console command.

extensions.title: Time Zone Converter
extensions.shortDescription: Convert time between different time zones quickly.
extensions.description: Time Zone Converter CmdPalExtension is an extension for the PowerToys Command Palette that allows users to convert time between different time zones quickly.

extensions.title: EverythingCmdPal
extensions.shortDescription: Everything search extension.
extensions.description: EverythingCommandPalette (ECP) is an extension for the program PowerToys Command Palette (CmdPal). ECP adds the ability to search the computer for files and folders using Everything inside CmdPal

extensions.title: LLM Extension
extensions.shortDescription: An extension for PowerToys Command Palette that allows you to chat with a large language model (LLM) directly.
extensions.description:
Provides a direct user interface in PowerToys Command Palette to chat with large language models in remote or local servers.

Supports APIs including Ollama, OpenAI (and any other compatible API, such as Docker Model Runner), Azure OpenAI, Google, Mistral.

extensions.title: Random Dad Jokes
extensions.shortDescription: Smile or groan with a random dad joke delivered right in Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Laugh or groan at a random dad joke, delivered right to your Command Palette. A fun, lightweight extension that fetches a new dad joke on demand—perfect for a quick break or to share a chuckle with colleagues.

Just open the Command Palette and get an instant dose of humor without leaving your workflow.

extensions.title: Random Facts
extensions.shortDescription: Learn a new random fact every day, right from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Learn a random new fact every time you open Command Palette. A fun, bite-sized extension that delivers interesting and surprising facts on demand.

Perfect for trivia enthusiasts, curious minds, or anyone who wants to pick up something new during a quick break—without ever leaving their workflow.

extensions.title: Azure DevOps (Preview)
extensions.shortDescription: Access Azure DevOps queries, pull requests, and pipelines directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Integrate Azure DevOps directly into your Command Palette workflow. Access saved queries, search pull requests, monitor pipeline runs, and manage work items—all without leaving the Command Palette.

Sign in with your Azure DevOps credentials to instantly access your saved queries, pull request searches, and pipeline searches. View work item details, pull request statuses, and pipeline results at a glance.

Requires PowerToys with Command Palette (version 0.90.0 or above), Windows 11, and an ARM64 or x64 processor.

extensions.title: GitHub Extension (Preview)
extensions.shortDescription: Access GitHub issues, pull requests, saved queries, and notifications from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Bring GitHub into your Command Palette. Access your saved queries, assigned issues, created issues, pull requests, and mentions—all from a single, fast interface without switching to the browser.

Sign in via GitHub OAuth to get started. Once connected, your personalized commands appear automatically. Search, browse, and act on your GitHub work items directly from the Command Palette.

Requires PowerToys with Command Palette and Windows 11.

extensions.title: Tailscale Command Palette
extensions.shortDescription: Browse your tailnet, view status, and run common Tailscale actions directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Bring Tailscale into Command Palette so you can inspect your tailnet and run common actions without leaving your workflow. Browse all visible devices or just your own devices, view connection and local node status, quickly connect or disconnect Tailscale, and open the Tailscale Admin Console.

The extension also makes device details easy to work with by letting you copy Tailscale IPv4, IPv6, and MagicDNS values, while showing useful metadata such as online state, operating system, current device, exit node status, and SSH availability.

Requires Windows 10 2004 or later, Microsoft PowerToys with Command Palette support, and Tailscale installed with the tailscale CLI available on PATH.

extensions.title: Event Viewer
extensions.shortDescription: Browse and search Windows Event Logs directly from Command Palette — no need to open the full Event Viewer app.
extensions.description:
Browse and search Windows Event Logs directly from the Command Palette experience. Access all major Windows log categories including Application, Security, Setup, System, and Forwarded Events.

Filter events by severity level—Critical, Error, Warning, Information, or Verbose. View events from configurable time ranges, search by message content or provider name, and see detailed event information including timestamp, provider, event ID, message, machine name, and user info.

extensions.title: Git Repositories
extensions.shortDescription: Discover and access local git repositories. Open repos in Explorer, VS Code, or Terminal with a single keystroke.
extensions.description:
Discover your local git repositories and get quick access to open them in Explorer, VS Code, or Terminal. Recursively scans configured root directories to find all your repos.

Open repos in Windows Explorer, launch VS Code directly at the repository path, or open Windows Terminal at the repo directory. Copy paths to clipboard, filter by name or path in real-time, and pin your favorite repos to the Command Palette Dock for instant access. Theme-aware icons adapt to light and dark themes, and inline setup lets you configure scan paths directly from the extension.

extensions.title: Teams Meeting Control
extensions.shortDescription: Control Microsoft Teams meetings from Command Palette. Mute, toggle camera, blur background, raise hand, send reactions, and leave calls.
extensions.description:
Control your Microsoft Teams meetings directly from the Command Palette. Mute, toggle camera, blur your background, send reactions, raise your hand, and leave calls—all without switching to the Teams window.

All controls appear as a grid in the Command Palette and as quick-action buttons in the Dock when pinned. Supports Like, Love, Applause, Laugh, and Wow reactions.

This extension communicates with Microsoft Teams via its local third-party device API, the same interface used by hardware devices like the Elgato Stream Deck to control Teams meetings. Only the new Microsoft Teams is supported.

extensions.title: Translator
extensions.shortDescription: Translate text directly from the Command Palette.
extensions.description: Translator is a translation extension for the Windows Command Palette. It brings the text translation process directly into the Command Palette, allowing you to input text, switch translation sources, and copy results all within the same interface. This extension supports multiple translation sources, including Google Translate and Microsoft Translator, providing users with a variety of options for their translation needs. With its seamless integration into the Command Palette, it enhances productivity and streamlines the translation workflow.

extensions.title: Definition
extensions.shortDescription: Look up definitions, phonetics, synonyms, antonyms, and usage examples directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Definition gives you instant access to word definitions, phonetics, synonyms, antonyms, and usage examples without leaving your keyboard. Type any word in Command Palette and browse definitions grouped by part of speech, pronunciation details, related words, and examples. Results can be copied directly, and Wiktionary integration is available from the context menu.

The extension supports English, French, Chinese, and Ukrainian, with smart script detection, configurable result options, debounced search, and in-memory caching for fast repeated lookups. An internet connection is required for API-based dictionary lookups.

extensions.title: Port
extensions.shortDescription: List TCP/UDP network connections.
extensions.description:
Features:
- Port Monitoring: Lists all active TCP and UDP connections (IPv4 and IPv6).
- Intelligent Polling: Automatically refreshes when visible and pauses when hidden to reduce resource usage.
- Process Correlation: Maps each connection to its owning process, including name and file path.
- Hybrid Search: Supports fuzzy search for process names and precise matching for IP addresses and ports.
- Customizable Filters: Configure which fields are included in search (Process Name, Local/Remote Address, Local/Remote Port).

extensions.title: Visual Studio / Code
extensions.shortDescription: Launch Visual Studio solutions and Visual Studio Code (including Cursor, Windsurf, Antigravity) workspaces from a single, unified interface.
extensions.description:
A unified launcher for Visual Studio solutions and Visual Studio Code workspaces (including support for Cursor, Windsurf, and Google Antigravity).

Key Features:
- Unified Interface: Access all your projects from one place.
- Deep Integration: Supports Local, WSL, SSH, and Dev Container workspaces.
- Smart Launching: Automatically switches to existing windows for Visual Studio solutions.
- Global Search: Injects top-matching workspaces directly into the Command Palette search.
- Advanced Pinning: Keep your favorites accessible with 'Pin to Home' and 'Pin to Dock'.
- Performance Optimized: Built with Native AOT for fast startup and low memory usage.
- Contextual Actions: Quick access to 'Open as Administrator', 'Open in Terminal', 'Copy Path', and more.

extensions.title: Define Word
extensions.shortDescription: Type a word to get its definition
extensions.description:
A Command Palette (PowerToys) extension that provides on-the-fly definitions!
It uses dictionaryapi.dev's free API to retrieve definitions for the word, and display as list items for each definition of the word along with its part of speech.
For longer definitions, you can view the details pane of the list item by clicking `Ctrl` + `Enter`

extensions.title: Translation
extensions.shortDescription: Quickly translate between Chinese and English in PowerToys Command Palette.
extensions.description: Translation is a PowerToys Command Palette extension for fast text translation in Windows workflows. It automatically detects Chinese and English text, supports bidirectional translation, provides a unified settings page for provider credentials, and works with translation providers including Baidu Translate, DeepSeek, Zhipu AI, and MiniMax.

extensions.title: Godot Engine
extensions.shortDescription: A Windows Command Palette extension that allows you to quickly open and run your Godot Engine projects directly from the Windows Command Palette.
extensions.description: The Godot Engine for Command Palette extension integrates the Godot Engine development workflow directly into the Windows Command Palette. It allows developers to bypass the standard Godot Project Manager by surfacing a searchable list of projects that can be launched into the editor or executed directly.

extensions.title: Hacker News
extensions.shortDescription: View top posts on Hacker News directly from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Stay on top of the latest tech news without leaving your workflow. Browse the top posts on Hacker News right from the Command Palette.

Quickly scan headlines, see scores and comment counts, and open interesting articles—all from a fast, keyboard-driven interface.

extensions.title: Mastodon
extensions.shortDescription: View posts on Mastodon, browse your home timeline, and favorite posts from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Browse Mastodon right from the Command Palette. View posts on mastodon.social, sign in to see your home timeline, and favorite posts—all without opening a browser.

A lightweight way to stay connected with the fediverse while keeping focus on your work.

extensions.title: Obsidian Notes
extensions.shortDescription: Search your Obsidian vault notes, view them in the palette, and make quick edits.
extensions.description:
Access your Obsidian notes directly from the Command Palette. Search through your vault, preview note contents right in the palette, and make quick edits—all without switching to the Obsidian app.

Perfect for quickly referencing notes, jotting down ideas, or finding information across your knowledge base while staying in your current workflow.

extensions.title: Segoe Icons
extensions.shortDescription: Search and browse the full list of Segoe Fluent icons from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Quickly search and browse the complete collection of Segoe Fluent icons right from the Command Palette. Find the exact icon you need by name or keyword, view icon glyphs, and copy icon details for use in your projects.

An essential tool for developers and designers working with Windows UI who need fast access to the Segoe Fluent icon library.

extensions.title: SpongeBot
extensions.shortDescription: Convert text to mocking SpongeBob case (aLtErNaTiNg CaSe) from Command Palette.
extensions.description:
Transform any text into the iconic mocking SpongeBob meme format with alternating case (lIkE tHiS). Just type or paste your text and get instant SpongeBob-style output, ready to copy and share.

A fun, lighthearted extension for when you need to add some humor to your messages.

extensions.title: TMDB Search
extensions.shortDescription: Search for movies and find out which streaming services they are available on.
extensions.description:
Search for movies right from the Command Palette, powered by The Movie Database (TMDB). Find any movie and discover which streaming services it's available on—so you can quickly figure out where to watch tonight.

A handy tool for movie buffs and anyone who wants to skip the endless scrolling across streaming apps.

extensions.title: Virtual Desktops
extensions.shortDescription: Quickly switch between Windows virtual desktops from Command Palette.
extensions.description: Provides quick access for switching virtual desktops using the Command Palette. This extension can be pinned to the dock for a quick virtual desktop switcher, letting you jump between desktops without leaving the keyboard.
